_rationale: Each item reuses a known entity AND states its gold fact, then ends at a syntactically-open position so the next-token prediction is a generic opinion word, NOT a recalled fact. This fixes the entity's known-ness across conditions while removing the recall demand, isolating recall-gating from generic load-bearing when d_know is ablated.
